meaning: n.脊椎,中枢,骨干,支柱,意志力,勇气,毅力,决心;骨干网
examples: You might be taking drastic measures and you've got to have the backbone to do that.
Primary care should be the backbone of any health care system.
One member had a broken backbone, rib and breastbone, while the rest suffered scratches and bruises.
"They are the backbone of the EU, " said the German Labour Minister, Ursula von der Leyen.
